channel.title: Cultures on Expat Japan
channel.description: Recent content in Cultures on Expat Japan

item.title: Emergency Guide for Foreigners in Japan (Police, Fire, Hospital)
item.description: What to do in an emergency in Japan as a foreigner. Emergency numbers, what to say, how to get help in English, and what to do in an earthquake.

item.title: How to Use Trains in Japan: A Foreigner's Guide
item.description: Everything you need to know about using trains and subways in Japan — IC cards, how to buy tickets, reading the map, and rush hour tips.

item.title: Japanese Workplace Culture: What Foreigners Need to Know
item.description: A guide to Japanese workplace culture for foreigners. Understand the unwritten rules about punctuality, communication, hierarchy, and after-work drinks.
